flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Central Virginia Community College rose 44% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.0k → $8.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Central Virginia Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Central Virginia Community College rose 82% between 2006 and 2009 (13.3% → 24.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Central Virginia Community College rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 2.2k).
